# PERF-141 positive: r.URL.Query() called repeatedly
lang: go
file: PERF-141-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = w
	page := r.URL.Query().Get("page")
	size := r.URL.Query().Get("size")
	tag := r.URL.Query().Get("tag")
	_ = page
	_ = size
	_ = tag
}
